PropertyMetaDataLikeDbColumn Property

One Identity Manager API Server
Gets or sets the name of a related database column.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Definition
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
public string LikeDbColumn { get; set; }

Property Value

Type: String
Remarks
The API validator will look for a column of this name in the table LikeDbTable, and copy the column configuration. If this property is null, the API validator will look for a column of the same name.
